zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pudsey Knt.於1360年出生在英國越可爾博爾頓時，他的父親Henry Pudsay22歲，母親Elizabeth Layton22歲。他於大約1398年與Margaret Eure在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1421年在法國安喬博熱享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pudsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pudsey (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Podechesai(e) in 1086, Pudekesseya in the 12th century, and Pudekeshay in 1219. The place-name probably derives from an Old English personal name * Pudoc (genitive * Pudoces) + Old English ēg ‘island’. Pudsey stands on the top of a hill, and so in this case ēg may have the sense ‘hill spur, island of good land in moorland’. Alternatively, the final element may be Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’ or hēah ‘high ground, height’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pudsey Knt. was born in 1360, in Bolton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Henry Pudsay, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Layton, was 22. He married Margaret Eure about 1398, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1421, in Baugé, Anjou, France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Pudsey Knt. est né en 1360, à Bolton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry Pudsay, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Layton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Eure environ 1398, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1421, à Baugé, Anjou, France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Pudsey Knt.が1360年にイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトンで生まれた時，父Henry Pudsayは22歳，母Elizabeth Laytonは22歳であった。約1398年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Eureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1421年にフランスアンジョウバウグeで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pudsey Knt.(이)가 1360년 영국 요르크실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Pudsay(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Layton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Eure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1421년 프랑스 앤조우 바그e에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Pudsey Knt. родился в 1360 г. в местности болтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Pudsay было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Layton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Eure около 1398 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1421 г. в местности баугe, анджоу, Франция в возрасте 62 лет.
